title: Paul Anthony Dual Port, USB-C + USB-A GaN PD30W Fast Charger for use with Mens and Womens Paul anthony Shavers, Trimmers and Clippers - H9801BK
availability_text: Only 10 left in stock (more on the way).
features: DUAL PORT - USB-C and USB-A fast charging ports, charging two devices at same time
GaN FAST CHARGER - GaN Technology for safe, efficient and low heat dissipation
POWER DELIVERY - PD 3.0 and QD 3.0 allows ultra fast charging times.
PROGRAMMABLE POWER SUPPLY - Programmable Power Supply (PPS) can modify in real time the voltage and current from 5v to 20v by feeding maximum power based on a device's charging status.
description: The Paul Anthony Dual Port GaN Fast Charger is the perfect charging accessory for all Paul Anthony shavers, trimmers or clippers. The USB-C and USB-A ports allow the charging of older and new products. 15W MAX for USB-A, 30W MAX for USB-C GaN FAST CHARGER - GaN Technology for safe, efficient and low heat dissipation. POWER DELIVERY - PD 3.0 and QD 3.0 allows ultra fast charging times. PROGRAMMABLE POWER SUPPLY - Programmable Power Supply (PPS) can modify in real time the voltage and current from 5v to 20v by feeding maximum power based on a device's charging status. This Ultra Fast USB Charger is suitable for the latest technology. including 30W fast charging for Mobile Phones, including Samsung and Applie iPhones. Input: 110-240v~ 50/60Hz Output DC: 5V3A /9V3A /12V2.5A/15V2A /20V1.5A Package includes: 1x USB Charger 1x Manual
